b1/2: independent user - c 1/2 proficient user common european framework of reference for languages have acquired mediating and intercultural skills during my internships: have interacted with costumers, have worked with military people and have worked in a concurrence environment with different departments and nationalities. both internships gave me the opportunity to develop a management and organization labour. have known the benefits of working as a part of a team in order to reach common objectives. extensive knowledge of microsoft office: word, excel, powerpoint and outlook. programming in mathlab, fortran and maple. graphic design with catia and sketchup. use of the stk environment. completed elementary degree and first course of the professional degree in piano. amaniel music conservatory of madrid. financial management course by cepade (polytechnic university of madrid) honour degree with an average of 9.9 out of 10 at agustinano high school (2009) excellent scholarship from madrid region (2009) european union, 2002-2013 http://europass.cedefop.europa.eu page 2/2
